text: I feel energized by curiosity here. The architecture and the environment exude modernity and creativity—a place where ideas are meant to be discovered, discussed, and transformed. The exhibition wall, with its intriguing display about development, research, and coexistence with intelligence, calls me to linger and contemplate the purpose and direction of human progress. The text I read resonates deeply: beneath the buzz of innovation is a quiet space for self-reflection, as if I have been invited to step out of the flow of time and think about what it all means. I feel a blend of awe and introspection.
